---
hub_index: false
title: "OWL Properties"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
---

OWL property guidance now lives in the canonical ontology conventions file.

- Conventions: <https://github.com/dfo-pacific-science/dfo-salmon-ontology/blob/main/docs/CONVENTIONS.md>
- Formal ontology docs: <https://w3id.org/gcdfo/salmon>
